official_pick_rules.note: Lab Score is setup quality. It is not win probability. Official picks require both strong win probability and strong setup quality.

summary: 2 official moneyline picks cleared the stricter model-probability and Lab Score gates. 6 value-watch setups had good price math but did not clear official-pick probability rules.

lab_score_breakdown.note: Lab Score grades setup quality. It is not win probability.

games.read: Chicago White Sox is an official moneyline pick because it clears both gates: 77.9% model win probability and 90/100 Lab Score. LyDia projects 77.9% against a 48.9% no-vig market number, a 29.0% model edge at -102. Chicago White Sox owns the starting pitcher edge by 43 points. Bullpen read: Elevated volatility.
